options.name: output-dir
options.description: Directory where output files are written. Default: input file directory

options.name: format
options.description: Output format. Values: json, text, html. Default: json

options.name: heading-level
options.description: Filter by heading levels (comma-separated, e.g. '1,2,3'). Default: all levels

options.name: sections
options.description: Extract only sections matching the given heading text (comma-separated). Case-insensitive substring match

options.name: include-frontmatter
options.description: Include YAML/TOML frontmatter in output. Default: true

options.name: strip-html
options.description: Strip inline HTML tags from Markdown content

options.name: include-code-blocks
options.description: Include fenced code blocks in output. Default: true

options.name: include-toc
options.description: Add a generated table of contents to the output

options.name: flatten-lists
options.description: Flatten nested lists into a single level

options.name: section-separator
options.description: Separator between sections in text output. Use %section-title% for heading text. Default: none

options.name: normalize-links
options.description: Convert relative links to absolute using the source file path
